mapper.select: select count(p_id) as agePeople from patient where p_age BETWEEN #{startAge} AND #{endAge}

SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(split_drug, '*', 1), '//', -1)) AS medicine_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (
SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(o_drug, '//', n.n), '//', -1) AS split_drug FROM orders JOIN (
SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) n ON CHAR_LENGTH(o_drug) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(o_drug, '//', '')) >= n.n - 1 ) subquery
WHERE split_drug != '' GROUP BY medicine_name;

SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(split_check, '*', 1), '//', -1)) AS check_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(o_check, '//', n.n), '//', -1) AS split_check FROM orders JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) n ON CHAR_LENGTH(o_check) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(o_check, '//', '')) >= n.n - 1 ) subquery
WHERE split_check != '' AND split_check NOT LIKE '%项目总价0元%' GROUP BY check_name;
